title: trichonema reflexum
intro: Trichonema reflexum, also known as Trichodesma reflexum, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in Australia and India. Traditionally, Trichonema reflexum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trichonema reflexum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Trichonema reflexum typically involve its leaves being used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, with some also using it in the form of capsules or tinctures.
